prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年海南省综合类最低位次分别为约3990名→4591名→4387名→4421名→4768名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约4768名，较2021年后移约778名，近3年 累计后移约381名；该校在海南省综合类招生计划2021–2023年均为19人，2024年增至20人，2025年大幅扩至26人；2026年计划34人，较2025年再扩招 约30.8%，扩招幅度显著，竞争压力有所缓解但考生基数同步增长。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第76位→2022年第74位→2023 年第74位→2024年第73位→2025年第71位→2026年第69位，排名持续稳步上升，学校综合实力和认可度逐年提升；2022年高考周期内曾出现学术不端负面事件（教 师学术不端受处分），声誉评价偏负面；2023年抖音热度排名第21位（较热），综合热度约18.8万；总排名第75位（一般），综合热度约35万；近年无明显投档断档记录，整体舆 情平稳偏中性；第五轮学科评估中，作物学、植物保护、畜牧学、草学获评A-，农林学科特色鲜明；与招生专业中植物保护、农学（农学类）等直接对应，对相 关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校计算机类、机械类等工科专业受益；农林类相关专 业（生物科学、植物保护等）社会热度一般偏冷；海南省综合类考生总数2021年52977人→2025年67408人→2026年约78000人（估算），考生规模持续扩大，竞争加剧；该校位于陕西省咸阳市，属西北地区；在海南省招生占比相对较小（2025年26人/全省67408人≈0.04%），地 域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次后移趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招（+30.8%）与海南省考生总数持续增长（+15.7%）的双向作用，扩招缓解竞争但考生增加 抵消部分效应；学校软科排名持续上升提升吸引力；预测2026年最低位次约5700名，较2025年4768名进一步后移（位次数字增大），区间5200–6200名。

一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 光电信息科学与工程
- 会计学（智能会计）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（机械设计制造及其自动化、机械电子工程、车辆工程）
- 食品科学与工程
- 葡萄与葡萄酒工程
- 水利类（水利水电工程、水文与水资源工程、农业水利工程、能源与动力工程）
- 智能建造
- 环境科学与工程类（环境工程、环境科学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 生物信息学
- 动物医学
- 植物保护

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5200–6200名内，建议以二档专业为主力选择（机械类、食品科学与工程、水利类等），一档专业（计算机类、光电信息、会计学）可作为冲刺目标；位次明显优 于区间下限（接近5200名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（6200名）建议以三档专业保底，其中植物保护、农学类为该校A-优势学科，性价比高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Hainan Province were approximately 3990 → 4591 → 4387 → 4421 → 4768, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The baseline in 2025 is about 4768, which is about 778 places behind 2021, and the cumulative backward shift in the past 3 years is about 381 places. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects at this university in Hainan Province was 19 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 20 in 2024, and significantly expanded to 26 in 2025. The plan for 2026 is 34 students, an increase of about 30.8% compared to 2025. The expansion is significant, easing competition pressure, but the number of candidates is also growing simultaneously.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science University Rankings, it ranked 76th in 2021 → 74th in 2022 → 74th in 2023 → 73rd in 2024 → 71st in 2025 → 69th in 2026, showing a steady upward trend, with the university's comprehensive strength and recognition improving year by year. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there was a negative academic misconduct incident (teacher academic misconduct punished), with a negative reputation evaluation. In 2023, it ranked 21st in Douyin popularity (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 188,000; overall ranking 75th (average), with a comprehensive popularity of about 350,000. There have been no obvious records of enrollment gaps in recent years, and the overall public opinion is stable and neutral. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Husbandry, and Grass Science were rated A-, highlighting distinctive agricultural and forestry disciplines. These directly correspond to majors such as Plant Protection and Agriculture (Agricultural Sciences) in the enrollment, providing some attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. Majors like Computer Science and Mechanical Engineering at this university benefit. Agricultural and forestry-related majors (e.g., Biological Sciences, Plant Protection) have generally low social popularity. The total number of comprehensive subject candidates in Hainan Province was 52,977 in 2021 → 67,408 in 2025 → approximately 78,000 in 2026 (estimated), with the candidate pool continuously expanding and competition intensifying. The university is located in Xianyang City, Shaanxi Province, in the northwest region. Its enrollment proportion in Hainan Province is relatively small (26 students in 2025 / 67,408 total in province ≈ 0.04%), so regional preference has a limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of declining rankings, the significant enrollment expansion in 2026 (+30.8%), and the continuous growth of Hainan Province candidates (+15.7%), the expansion eases competition but the increase in candidates offsets some effects. The university's steadily rising Soft Science ranking enhances its appeal. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 5700, further declining from 4768 in 2025 (ranking number increases), with a range of 5200–6200.

- Accounting (Intelligent Accounting)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)

- Bioinformatics

- Horticulture (Horticulture)
- Smart Agriculture
- Agriculture (Agricultural Sciences)
- Digital Economy (International Trade)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5200–6200, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Mechanical Engineering, Food Science and Engineering, Water Resources Engineering, etc.) as the main choices, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Optoelectronic Information, Accounting) as reach targets. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (close to 5200), you can focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (6200), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, among which Plant Protection and Agricultural Sciences are A- advantage disciplines of this university, offering high cost-performance.
